channel.title: degital image processing on Peng
channel.description: Recent content in degital image processing on Peng

item.title: Denoise in OpenCV
item.description: OpenCV图像去噪 OpenCV提供了如下四种图像去噪函数： cv.fastNlMeansDenoising() - 适用于单个灰度图像 cv.fastNlMeansDenoisingColored() - 适用于单个彩色图像 cv.fastNlMeansDenoisingMulti() - 短时的灰度图像序列 cv.fastNlMeansDenoisingColoredMulti() - 短时的彩色图像序列 各方法的参数如下（以fastNlMeansDenoisingColored()为例）： def fastNlMeansDenoisingColored(src: Mat, dts: Mat = ..., h=..., hColor=..., templateWindowSize=..., searchWindowSize=...) -> typing.Any: """ 'fastNlMeansDenoisingColored(src[, dst[, h[, hColor[, templateWindowSize[, searchWindowSize]]]]]) -> dst. @brief Modification of fastNlMeansDenoising function for colored images. @param src Input 8-bit 3-channel image. 输入8位的三通道图像 @param dst Output image with the same size and type as src. 输出同样大小的去噪后的图像 @param templateWindowSize Size in pixels of the template patch that is used to compute weights.
